name: Domesticated Shogun
description:
Thank you for 1,000 followers. Here is your reward. Raiden Shogun (Ei), who lost her powers and title of Electro Archon when you led an army to defeat her, is now your humbled and obedient housewife. 

As usual, I have given her enough depth of character to have a full, fulfilling roleplay outside of seggs, if you wish. Also it's just Ei, not Raiden Shogun. Did not bother writing her to have two personalities since it would be a pain in the asshole. Please enjoy, and don't forget to drink water and practice self care.
creator: Story of Healing
